requirement_topic.en: GPL Grid Interconnection — 60 Hz Ride-Through, Anti-Islanding, and 120/240 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: GPL并网——60 Hz穿越、防孤岛及120/240 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: GPL併網——60 Hz穿越、防孤島及120/240 V參數

summary.en: Guyana Power & Light's National Grid Code applies to parties interconnected to the GPL system and includes an Interconnection Code and Minimum Technical Requirements for new generation facilities. The Grid Code states that GPL's network frequency objective is 60 Hz and defines normal and emergency frequency ranges, with renewable generation facilities subject to frequency ride-through, voltage ride-through, reactive power, power-quality, control, and modelling requirements. For distributed or customer-side PV, project owners should also confirm the applicable GPL/GEA interconnection route. Inverter settings must be configured for Guyana's 60 Hz / 120-240 V service context and the applicable point-of-interconnection voltage, not China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V baseline.
summary.zh: Guyana Power & Light《国家电网规范》适用于接入GPL系统的各方，并包括并网规范和新发电设施最低技术要求。该规范规定GPL网络频率目标为60 Hz，并定义正常及紧急频率范围；可再生能源发电设施须满足频率穿越、电压穿越、无功功率、电能质量、控制和建模要求。对于分布式或用户侧光伏，项目业主还应确认适用的GPL/GEA并网路径。逆变器设置须针对圭亚那60 Hz / 120-240 V供电背景及适用并网点电压进行配置，而非中国50 Hz / 220-380 V基准。
summary.zht: Guyana Power & Light《國家電網規範》適用於接入GPL系統的各方，並包括併網規範和新發電設施最低技術要求。該規範規定GPL網路頻率目標為60 Hz，並定義正常及緊急頻率範圍；再生能源發電設施須滿足頻率穿越、電壓穿越、無功功率、電能品質、控制和建模要求。對於分散式或用戶側光伏，項目業主還應確認適用的GPL/GEA併網路徑。逆變器設置須針對圭亞那60 Hz / 120-240 V供電背景及適用併網點電壓進行配置，而非中國50 Hz / 220-380 V基準。

standards_or_laws: GPL National Grid Code — Interconnection Code and Minimum Technical Requirements for generation interconnection
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC TS 62910 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure for low-voltage ride-through measurements
Guyana service context — 60 Hz, commonly 120/240 V low-voltage service; project settings must match the actual GPL point of interconnection

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station connection to the power system, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding or ride-through test reports. These documents are prepared for China's 50 Hz grid and standard 220/380 V low-voltage conditions. They do not automatically demonstrate compliance with GPL's 60 Hz interconnection requirements, Guyana's low-voltage service context, or project-specific GPL/GEA approval conditions.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求，以及国内防孤岛或穿越测试报告。这些文件面向中国50 Hz电网和220/380 V标准低压条件，不能自动证明符合GPL的60 Hz并网要求、圭亚那低压供电背景或项目特定GPL/GEA批准条件。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求，以及國內防孤島或穿越測試報告。這些文件面向中國50 Hz電網和220/380 V標準低壓條件，不能自動證明符合GPL的60 Hz併網要求、圭亞那低壓供電背景或項目特定GPL/GEA批准條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese 50 Hz grid certificates and factory protection profiles do not transfer directly to Guyana. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence at 60 Hz, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, LVRT/FRT documentation where required by GPL, harmonic and power-quality evidence, and a firmware settings sheet showing voltage, frequency, reconnection, trip, and anti-islanding parameters for Guyana. Because GPL's Grid Code addresses weak-system issues such as short-circuit ratio and renewable generation controls, utility-scale or weak-grid projects may require project-specific studies and retesting beyond catalogue certificates.
gap.zh: 差距：中国50 Hz并网证书和出厂保护配置不能直接转移至圭亚那。出口商应准备60 Hz条件下的IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、GPL要求时的LVRT/FRT文件、谐波和电能质量证据，以及显示圭亚那电压、频率、重连、跳闸和防孤岛参数的固件设置表。由于GPL电网规范涉及短路比、可再生能源控制等弱电网问题，公用事业规模或弱电网项目可能需要项目特定研究和超出目录证书范围的重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國50 Hz併網證書和出廠保護配置不能直接轉移至圭亞那。出口商應準備60 Hz條件下的IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、GPL要求時的LVRT/FRT文件、諧波和電能品質證據，以及顯示圭亞那電壓、頻率、重連、跳閘和防孤島參數的韌體設置表。由於GPL電網規範涉及短路比、再生能源控制等弱電網問題，公用事業規模或弱電網項目可能需要項目特定研究和超出目錄證書範圍的重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter or PV generation facility is interconnected to the GPL system; exact studies, settings, and approval route depend on project size, point of interconnection, and GPL/GEA review
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid and certification needs only; it is not a substitute for GPL interconnection acceptance in Guyana

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Guyana as a 60 Hz grid market. Reconfigure and document inverter protection, reconnection, and anti-islanding settings for the actual GPL point of interconnection before submission or commissioning. Chinese 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid evidence should be treated as background only unless GPL, GEA, the project engineer, and GNBS accept specific supplementary test evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将圭亚那视为60 Hz电网市场。在提交或调试前，应针对实际GPL并网点重新配置并记录逆变器保护、重连和防孤岛设置。中国50 Hz / 220-380 V并网证据仅宜作为背景资料，除非GPL、GEA、项目工程师和GNBS接受特定补充测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將圭亞那視為60 Hz電網市場。在提交或調試前，應針對實際GPL併網點重新配置並記錄逆變器保護、重連和防孤島設置。中國50 Hz / 220-380 V併網證據僅宜作為背景資料，除非GPL、GEA、項目工程師和GNBS接受特定補充測試證據。

requirement_topic.en: GEA Renewable-Energy Programme Context — Grid-Tied, Hinterland, and Utility Solar Projects
requirement_topic.zh: GEA可再生能源项目背景——并网、内陆地区和公用事业太阳能项目
requirement_topic.zht: GEA再生能源項目背景——併網、內陸地區和公用事業太陽能項目

summary.en: Guyana's solar market is expanding through utility, public-sector, hinterland/off-grid, isolated-grid, and customer-choice renewable-energy programmes under the Guyana Energy Agency and Guyana's Low Carbon Development Strategy 2030. Grid-tied projects must be coordinated with GPL where they connect to GPL's system, while isolated and hinterland projects may use project-specific technical specifications. Guyana's rapid oil-led economic growth and power-sector expansion, including gas-to-energy and transmission investments, do not remove inverter compliance gates: projects still need the correct GNBS/GPL/GEA documentation and settings for the local 60 Hz system.
summary.zh: 圭亚那太阳能市场正在通过圭亚那能源署及《低碳发展战略2030》下的公用事业、公共部门、内陆/离网、孤立电网和消费者选择可再生能源项目扩张。并网项目如接入GPL系统，须与GPL协调；孤立电网和内陆地区项目可能采用项目特定技术规格。圭亚那因石油带动的经济增长以及电力部门扩张（包括天然气发电和输电投资）并不取消逆变器合规门槛：项目仍需符合当地60 Hz系统的GNBS/GPL/GEA文件和设置要求。
summary.zht: 圭亞那太陽能市場正在通過圭亞那能源署及《低碳發展戰略2030》下的公用事業、公共部門、內陸/離網、孤立電網和消費者選擇再生能源項目擴張。併網項目如接入GPL系統，須與GPL協調；孤立電網和內陸地區項目可能採用項目特定技術規格。圭亞那因石油帶動的經濟增長以及電力部門擴張（包括天然氣發電和輸電投資）並不取消逆變器合規門檻：項目仍需符合當地60 Hz系統的GNBS/GPL/GEA文件和設置要求。

standards_or_laws: Guyana Energy Agency renewable-energy programme information
GPL National Grid Code where a PV project interconnects to the GPL system
Project-specific employer's requirements for hinterland, isolated-grid, public-sector, or utility solar procurements

summary.en: China's distributed and utility PV projects are governed by Chinese energy policies, grid company connection rules, and domestic technical standards such as NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, and GB/T 19964. These are useful for describing a manufacturer's China track record but do not establish eligibility for Guyana public-sector tenders, GEA-supported programmes, GPL interconnection, or CARICOM-region project specifications.
summary.zh: 中国分布式和公用事业光伏项目受中国能源政策、电网企业接入规则及NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964等国内技术标准管理。这些资料有助于说明制造商在中国的项目经验，但不构成圭亚那公共部门招标、GEA支持项目、GPL并网或CARICOM地区项目规格的资格证明。
summary.zht: 中國分散式和公用事業光伏項目受中國能源政策、電網企業接入規則及NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964等國內技術標準管理。這些資料有助於說明製造商在中國的項目經驗，但不構成圭亞那公共部門招標、GEA支持項目、GPL併網或CARICOM地區項目規格的資格證明。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese project approvals and domestic certificates do not establish acceptance in Guyana's public, hinterland, isolated-grid, or GPL-connected solar programmes. Tender files should map each inverter model to the project specification, IEC safety and grid-interface reports, 60 Hz settings, tropical-environment ratings, spares/service obligations, and any GNBS import, inspection, or certification requirements. For off-grid or weak-grid hinterland projects, inverter-grid forming, battery compatibility, grounding, surge protection, and local maintenance evidence may be as important as grid-export certificates.
gap.zh: 差距：中国项目批准和国内证书不能证明可被圭亚那公共部门、内陆地区、孤立电网或GPL并网太阳能项目接受。投标文件应将每个逆变器型号对应至项目规格、IEC安全和电网接口报告、60 Hz设置、热带环境额定值、备件/服务义务，以及任何GNBS进口、检验或认证要求。对于离网或弱电网内陆地区项目，逆变器成网能力、电池兼容性、接地、防浪涌和本地维护证据可能与并网输出证书同等重要。
gap.zht: 差距：中國項目批准和國內證書不能證明可被圭亞那公共部門、內陸地區、孤立電網或GPL併網太陽能項目接受。投標文件應將每個逆變器型號對應至項目規格、IEC安全和電網介面報告、60 Hz設置、熱帶環境額定值、備件/服務義務，以及任何GNBS進口、檢驗或認證要求。對於離網或弱電網內陸地區項目，逆變器成網能力、電池相容性、接地、防浪湧和本地維護證據可能與併網輸出證書同等重要。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory where stated in GEA/GPL programme rules, public tender specifications, project-owner employer's requirements, or GNBS import/conformity procedures
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese programme approvals and domestic project references are not transferable to Guyana

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Guyana's solar demand is growing, but project route matters. Separate GPL grid-tied submissions from GEA-supported, public-procurement, isolated-grid, and hinterland/off-grid packages, and align each inverter configuration to Guyana's 60 Hz conditions. Do not present China project approvals as a substitute for Guyana project-owner, GNBS, GEA, or GPL requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 圭亚那太阳能需求正在增长，但项目路径很关键。应区分GPL并网提交、GEA支持项目、公共采购、孤立电网及内陆/离网文件包，并使每个逆变器配置匹配圭亚那60 Hz条件。不得将中国项目批准作为圭亚那项目业主、GNBS、GEA或GPL要求的替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 圭亞那太陽能需求正在增長，但項目路徑很關鍵。應區分GPL併網提交、GEA支持項目、公共採購、孤立電網及內陸/離網文件包，並使每個逆變器配置匹配圭亞那60 Hz條件。不得將中國項目批准作為圭亞那項目業主、GNBS、GEA或GPL要求的替代。
